description_long: This fantastical crustacean features a bulbous yellow head with a single orange horn and a prominent, spiraled spike extending from the top. Its body is segmented, with a white, rounded cephalothorax and a long, scaly, fish-like tail ending in a black, finned tip. The creature has one large, segmented orange claw on its right side and several black, tentacle-like appendages tipped with gold on its left. Its face is adorned with a protruding tongue and small, round eyes, while black, curving structures wrap around its torso. The overall appearance is both whimsical and menacing, blending organic and fantastical elements.
description: A whimsical, segmented crustacean with a yellow head, spiraled horn, orange claw, black tentacles, and a scaly fish-like tail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the yellow head, spiraled horn, protruding tongue, and black tentacles wrapping around the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the large orange claw, the arrangement of black tentacles, and the full length of the scaly tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the spiraled horn, and the black fin at the end of the tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the white cephalothorax, the orange claw, and the tentacles extending outward.
